primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison by phosphorylation, acetylation, ubiquitination, or activation markers.
evidence: Phosphorylation of full length CK1δ for MS–MS analysis and kinetics measurement was done by incubating the protein at 298 K with 10 mM ATP (Sigma) for 4 h

replicate_hints: All the reactions were carried out in triplicates.

evidence: Figure 1 shows that the kinetics of the first two phosphorylation sites, S585 and S588, were slower with the full length kinase relative to the measurements with the isolated kinase domain.
Mutating the last four phosphorylation sites (Thr397, Ser406, Ser407, Ser411) to alanine resulted in an increase in the kinase activity relative to the wild type sequence

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment uses a QExactive HF mass spectrometer with Top 10 precursor selection and HCD fragmentation, which is characteristic of DDA. No labeling (SILAC, isobaric, or dimethyl) is mentioned for the site-identification MS; it is a standard tryptic digestion of purified protein.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The primary goal of the MS analysis was phosphorylation-site identification on the CK1δ C-terminal domain, although the text describes a purified protein rather than a complex lysate enrichment.
